creator: mike@fth-devel.net
text:
If one of textproc/fop or textproc/xmlto is installed, the port fails to build.

How-To-Repeat: Install either of textproc/fop or textproc/xmlto before and:
# cd /usr/ports/x11/libICE && make install clean
===>  Extracting for libICE-1.0.7,1

===>   libICE-1.0.7,1 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xproto.pc - found
===>   libICE-1.0.7,1 depends on executable: pkg-config - found
